_comment: Species: Soul Lasher Beast (魂鞭兽) from Renegade Immortal. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Soul Lasher Beast

canonical.appearance: Serpentine body 8 m long covered in soul-tendrils, no eyes, senses by soul-fluctuation
canonical.size: 8 m adult, 800 jin; ancient 30 m, 10000 jin
canonical.behavior: Lashes prey with soul-tendrils that drain cultivation base; herds prey into dead-end caves
canonical.habitat: Soul-aspected caves, Soul Refining territory, ghost valleys
canonical.diet: soul fragments, cultivation base, soul-aspected herbs
canonical.relationships: Bred by Soul Refining Sect as guardians
canonical.bloodline: Soul-Devil lineage; born of accumulated soul fragments
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: soul_lasher_beast — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
